signals.raw:
Ripple's Quantum-Resistant XRPL Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger (XRPL) quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid signatures in H2 2026; this positions XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum timelines.[2][4]
